name: kl-plugin-openauth
description: kanban-lite auth.identity/auth.policy plugin – OpenAuth.js provider with OAuth redirect flow and optional embedded issuer

scripts.build: KANBAN_PLUGIN_PACKAGE_DIR=$PWD pnpm --dir ../.. exec vite build --config scripts/vite.plugin-package.config.mts
scripts.watch: KANBAN_PLUGIN_PACKAGE_DIR=$PWD pnpm --dir ../.. exec vite build --watch --config scripts/vite.plugin-package.config.mts
scripts.release: npm run clean && npm run build && npm version patch && npm publish
scripts.release:minor: npm run clean && npm run build && npm version minor && npm publish
scripts.release:major: npm run clean && npm run build && npm version major && npm publish
